display_text: Grimstroke Aghanim's Scepter: Dark Portrait creates an ink illusion of an enemy hero with debuff immunity and high magic resistance. This upgrade counters single-target disables and magic damage, allowing Grimstroke to create a powerful, nearly unkillable distraction that can disrupt enemy formations and force them to focus the illusion.
search_text: Grimstroke Aghanim Scepter Dark Portrait illusion debuff immunity magic resistance anti-disable distraction

display_text: Grimstroke Aghanim's Shard: Enhances Ink Swell with a basic dispel on cast and increases its damage while healing the target. This upgrade counters soft disables (slows, roots) and sustain damage, transforming Ink Swell into a defensive and offensive tool that enables safer initiations and sustain for allies.
search_text: Grimstroke Aghanim Shard Ink Swell dispel sustain heal anti-disable initiation
